description: hex brain daemon runs continuously, ticks every 60s, runs validate + auto-fixes + reconciles workplans. Writes brain_tick events to SpacetimeDB.

phases.description: hex brain daemon runs a tick loop in foreground. Each tick calls validate(), auto-fixes safe issues, sleeps interval_secs.
phases.name: Foreground daemon loop

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/brain.rs: add BrainAction::Daemon { interval_secs, max_failures }. daemon() calls validate() in a tokio loop with tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_secs(interval_secs)). Exits cleanly on SIGINT. Max consecutive failures before pause. Use tracing::info! for each tick start/end.
tasks.name: Add Daemon variant to BrainAction + daemon() function

phases.description: Each tick POSTs a brain_tick event to /api/events with check results.
phases.name: Tick emits brain_tick event

tasks.description: In daemon() tick body: after validate completes, POST to http://127.0.0.1:5555/api/events with {type: 'brain_tick', timestamp, checks: [...], issues: N, auto_fixed: N, duration_ms}. Use reqwest (already in deps). Swallow errors — don't fail the tick.
tasks.name: Emit brain_tick event per tick

phases.description: hex brain daemon --background forks and writes PID to ~/.hex/brain-daemon.pid. hex brain daemon stop reads PID and sends SIGTERM.
phases.name: Background mode with PID file

tasks.description: BrainAction::Daemon gets a --background flag. When set: daemonize (double-fork on unix), write PID to ~/.hex/brain-daemon.pid, detach stdin/stdout. BrainAction::DaemonStop: read PID file, send SIGTERM, wait, confirm. BrainAction::DaemonStatus: check PID file + process existence.
tasks.name: Add --background flag + stop subcommand
